message:
fix(bus): shutdown rejects pending waiters + idleLoop abort race

shutdown() now clears pending waiter timers and rejects with error
before killing processes, preventing hanging promises on teardown.

idleLoop moves abort signal listener inside the Promise constructor
so it registers after resolve is assigned, closing the race where
abort fires before the callback exists. Removes the now-unnecessary
resolveIdle variable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
